description_long: This object is a classic record player with a rectangular wooden base and a large, circular black turntable platter at its center. The platter features a central spindle and is accompanied by a slender tonearm with a red stylus, positioned to the right and resting over the platter. Two control knobs are visible on the front corners of the wooden base, one larger and one smaller, likely for volume and speed adjustment. A transparent, hinged dust cover is attached at the back and is shown in the open position, providing protection for the platter and tonearm when closed. The overall design is minimalist, with a natural wood finish and black, gray, and red accents. The record player appears sturdy and functional, suitable for use in a home, garage, or urban lounge setting.
description: A wooden record player with a black platter, red-tipped tonearm, two control knobs, and a transparent open dust cover.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the wooden base, black platter, red-tipped tonearm, two control knobs, and the open dust cover.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by the raised, opaque dust cover, obscuring most of the record player's features.
description_view_2: Side angled view highlighting the platter, tonearm, and the open dust cover extending upward and backward.
description_view_3: Direct front view showing the platter, tonearm, both control knobs, and the open dust cover clearly.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, large, and circular, occupying most of the top surface. It is black with a smooth, matte finish and features a central spindle. No grooves or decorative patterns are visible, and it appears to be made of plastic or metal.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, slender, and straight, extending from the right side of the base toward the center of the platter. It is medium-length, metallic gray with a red stylus at the end, and is currently resting over the platter. The tonearm appears to have a pivot joint at its base.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible, attached to the end of the tonearm. It is small, red, and rectangular, likely made of plastic with a fine metal tip, and clearly distinct from the tonearm.
attribute_control_knobs: Two control knobs are present on the front corners of the wooden base. The left knob is larger and gray, while the right knob is smaller and black. Both are circular and made of plastic, with no visible labels or markings.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of transparent or translucent plastic, and is attached to the back of the record player with hinges. It is currently in the open position, extending upward and backward, and appears to be removable or closable.
